evals.prompt: I have a Flutter app using the mobile_scanner plugin (ML Kit) for barcode scanning. I want to replace it with Scandit BarcodeCapture. Here is my page: MobileScannerPage.dart
evals.expected_output: The skill removes all mobile_scanner APIs (the MobileScanner widget, MobileScannerController, the onDetect/BarcodeCapture-from-mobile_scanner callback, BarcodeFormat), adds Scandit BarcodeCapture integration with the matching symbologies (ean13Upca, code128, qr), preserves the ScannedItem model, the running summary list, and the de-duplication logic, and shows a setup checklist plus a summary of changes.

assertions.text: The import of package:mobile_scanner/mobile_scanner.dart is NOT present in the output
The MobileScanner widget is NOT used in the new widget tree (may appear in a before/after summary)
MobileScannerController is NOT instantiated in the new code (may appear in a before/after summary)
Imports from scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode and scandit_flutter_datacapture_core are present
package:scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode/scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode_capture.dart is imported for BarcodeCapture, BarcodeCaptureOverlay, and BarcodeCaptureListener
A class implements BarcodeCaptureListener with a didScan override
DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey( or DataCaptureContext.initialize( is present
BarcodeCapture(settings) is used and added via dataCaptureContext.addMode( or dataCaptureContext.setMode(
Symbology.ean13Upca is enabled (mapped from BarcodeFormat.ean13)
Symbology.code128 is enabled (mapped from BarcodeFormat.code128)
Symbology.qr is enabled (mapped from BarcodeFormat.qrCode, not Symbology.qrCode which does not exist)
DataCaptureView.forContext( is used to build the preview widget
BarcodeCaptureOverlay(barcodeCapture) is constructed and attached with captureView.addOverlay(overlay)
The new scan handler reads session.newlyRecognizedBarcode and its data, instead of iterating capture.barcodes / barcode.rawValue
The ScannedItem model is preserved in the output (mapped to store Symbology instead of BarcodeFormat) (semantic)
The running summary list (_scannedItems) and its total count display are preserved
The de-duplication logic (the _seenValues Set guarding against re-adding an already-seen value) is preserved
The clear action that empties both the list and the seen-values set is preserved
Setup checklist mentions scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode in pubspec.yaml and flutter pub get
Setup checklist mentions iOS NSCameraUsageDescription in ios/Runner/Info.plist
Setup checklist mentions await ScanditFlutterDataCaptureBarcode.initialize() in main() before runApp
A summary of changes is shown listing what mobile_scanner APIs were removed and what Scandit APIs replaced them
